log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Firbolg — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Firbolg — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:19+6=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Firbolg — Unarmored Caster HP: 52/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Ogre --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 11 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL! 8 psychic damage. HP: 51/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Firbolg — Unarmored Caster.
